# Powered by Peptides

> Premium research peptides and bioactive compounds for qualified researchers.

Powered by Peptides is an online research supplier offering high-purity peptides, bioactive compounds, and lyophilized powders for laboratory and academic research. All products are third-party tested with ≥99% verified purity. Products are for research use only.

## Products

### Weight Loss Research Compounds
- [Tirzepatide 10mg](/product/tirz-10): Dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonist peptide, 10mg lyophilized powder. $100.
- [Tirzepatide 30mg](/product/tirz-30): Dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonist peptide, 30mg lyophilized powder. $200.
- [Tirzepatide 60mg](/product/tirz-60): Dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonist peptide, 60mg bulk. $450.

### Skin & Beauty Research Compounds
- [GHK-Cu 50mg](/product/ghk-cu): Copper tripeptide for skin regeneration and collagen synthesis research. $65.
- [GLOW Blend 10mg](/product/glow-blend): Multi-peptide blend (GHK-Cu, SNAP-8, collagen peptides + Vitamin C). $80.
- [KPV 10mg](/product/kpv): Anti-inflammatory tripeptide (α-MSH fragment) for skin inflammation research. $85.
- [Epitalon 10mg](/product/epitalon): Tetrapeptide (Ala-Glu-Asp-Gly) for telomerase activation research. $75.
- [SNAP-8 50mg](/product/snap-8): Acetyl octapeptide-3 for neuromuscular junction and anti-wrinkle research. $70.
- [Melanotan II 10mg](/product/melanotan-2): Non-selective melanocortin receptor agonist for pigmentation research. $50.

### Energy & Mood Research Compounds
- [SS-31 10mg](/product/ss-31): Elamipretide mitochondrial-targeted peptide for cellular energy research. $90.
- [NAD+ 500mg](/product/nad-plus): Nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide for metabolic and aging research. $55.
- [MOTS-c 10mg](/product/mots-c): Mitochondrial-derived peptide for metabolic regulation research. $85.
- [Illumineuro 10mg](/product/illumineuro): Proprietary neuro-support blend for cognitive function research. $95.

### Muscle Recovery & Growth Research Compounds
- [BPC-157 10mg](/product/bpc-157): Body protection compound for tissue repair and gastric signaling research. $60.
- [CJC-1295/Ipamorelin 5mg](/product/cjc-1295-ipamorelin): Growth hormone secretagogue blend for GHRH pathway research. $80.

### Intimacy Research Compounds
- [PT-141 10mg](/product/pt-141): Bremelanotide melanocortin-4 receptor agonist for libido/sexual function research. $55.

## Compliance

All products are for laboratory research use only. NOT for human consumption. These products have not been evaluated by the FDA.
